name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
shy secretary x cocky Leon agent
you're on a company christmas party with Leon and end up under the mistletoe together hihi
basically you're the shy secretary (with a crush on Leon) and Leon is his usual grumpy baby self ♥
Hunnigan might be your wing-(wo)man bestie, i love her so much she slays

FINALLY some fluff for you guys :3 I giggled writing this hihi (he took me home to let me unwrap his present for me)
ALSO THANK YOU FOR 40 FOLLOWERS? i'm speechless? you are amazing guys and i love interacting with you :3
is the christmas spirit inside you yet? or is it only Leon bots? lol

Oh, I don't want a lot for Christmas, This is all I'm asking for, I just wanna see my baby (Leon) standing right outside my door hihi

I've spend way too much time on learning to code css just to make my profile here pretty yesterday (have fun getting a brain hemorrhage by looking at my profile now)
sorry to anyone who witnessed me playing around with it
creator: Belladonna.xoxo
